scripts.dev: npm run -w apps/web && npm run fastapi-dev
scripts.dev-front: npm run docker-back && npm run -w apps/web
scripts.docker-back: docker compose up -d db db_test backend --build
scripts.fastapi-dev-COMMENT: TODO: look into if && is cross-platform; if not, replace accordingly
scripts.fastapi-dev: cd backend && uv sync --extra dev && uv run fastapi dev ../api/index.py
